title: Lush Creepers
description: Leans into the plant aspects of the creeper, changing the texture to be more plant like and changing the charged effect to look more like pollen.
body:
I decided to make the creepers more plant like by updating the leafy greens to fit more in line with the azelea tree and giving roots, With a base of stone and a hollow looking face.

If it says it was made for a different version, You can ignore it. Honestly Idk how to make it stop doing it.
